name: In The Middle
short_description: you work in a haunted laundry. In the morning, you run your business, at night you survive through the scary night.
detailed_description: You newly bought a laundry shop in a peaceful downtown. While everything looks normal in the morning, at night... everything changes. You try to survive in a haunted place while every laundry machine in your laundrette start to get cursed, you put detergant to calm the machines. Will you able to survive?
about_the_game: You newly bought a laundry shop in a peaceful downtown. While everything looks normal in the morning, at night... everything changes. You try to survive in a haunted place while every laundry machine in your laundrette start to get cursed, you put detergant to calm the machines. Will you able to survive?
supported_languages: English, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Turkish, French, Italian, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean, Norwegian, Romanian, Ukrainian, Greek, Swedish
